description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with three stages: pre, build, and test. Use a docker:stable image with a docker:dind service for the build job, set DOCKER_DRIVER=overlay2 and DOCKER_HOST=tcp://docker:2375/, run a before_script of "docker info", then in the build stage add a job named build that executes "docker build -t buildbox-fuse ." followed by "docker run --cap-add SYS_ADMIN --device /dev/fuse buildbox-fuse ./integration-test/scripts/test-stage-empty-file.sh". Also in the build stage add a job named check_formatting that uses the ubuntu:bionic image, runs a before_script "apt-get update && apt-get install -y clang-format-6.0 git-core", then runs the script steps: "echo `which clang-format-6.0`", "ln -s `which clang-format-6.0` /usr/bin/clang-format", "cd \"$CI_PROJECT_DIR\"", "export CLANG_FORMAT_SINCE_COMMIT=\"4b825dc642cb6eb9a060e54bf8d69288fbee4904\"", "linter_errors=$(git-clang-format-6.0 --commit \"$CLANG_FORMAT_SINCE_COMMIT\" -q --diff --style file --extensions c,cc,cpp,cxx,h | grep -v --color=never \"no modified files to format\" || true)", "echo \"$linter_errors\"", and a conditional that exits with error if formatting issues are found. In the test stage add a job named test that uses the image registry.gitlab.com/buildgrid/buildbox/buildbox-common:latest and runs: "apt-get update", "apt-get install -y attr cmake fuse3 gcc g++ git grpc++ libfuse3-dev libssl-dev net-tools pkg-config socat sudo uuid-dev", "apt-get clean", "git clone https://gitlab.com/BuildGrid/buildbox/buildbox-casd.git", "mkdir buildbox-casd/build && cd buildbox-casd/build && cmake .. && make -j4 && cd -", "export PATH=\"$PWD/buildbox-casd/build/buildboxcasd:$PATH\"", "export CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1", "useradd -s /bin/bash -m testeruser && chown -R testeruser:testeruser $(pwd)", and "sudo -u testeruser PATH=\"$PATH\" sh -c 'mkdir build && cd build && cmake .. && make && make test'". Finally, add a pre‑stage job named trigger_integration_test that runs only on the master branch and triggers the pipeline buildgrid/buildbox/buildbox-integration.
